title: goniopteris cuneata
intro: Goniopteris cuneata, also known as the wedge fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris cuneata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared from the leaves and rhizomes of the plant.
